title: PixelCafe Oficial
body:
Official Modpack for PixelCafé Server. This server tries to adapt the pokemon experience to one of the latest versions of Minecraft.

Modpack includes:
Client-side Mods for optimization (better fps and general performance)
Official version of Pixelmon Mod (for NeoForge 1.21.1). Visit The Official Pixelmon Web for further information about Pixelmon and its wiki.

Minimap and JEI for a better experiencie: you can see how to craft things and were you are on the minimap

Includes Sodium that allows you to change many things from the config to improve performance. We suggest you to adjust the settings for a better experience (you can see what impact on performance each setting has)

Includes JustZoom that allows you to zoom things. You can edit the key for the zoom.
